name: Easter Gold Metal Botanical Garland - Threshold™
description:
Add celebratory shine to your decor with this Easter Gold Metal Botanical Garland from Threshold™. This Easter-themed garland in gold tone features bell-shaped flowers, sculpted petal flowers and ribbed foliage along a gold-tone wire cord, creating a standout display. Crafted from metal and designed in a horizontal orientation, this 72-inch-long garland brings a glamorous, festive detail to mantels, doorways or walls.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
